{{Infobox character
| name = Eminence Core
| aliases = Core
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Pilot (novel)|The Pilot]]
}}

== The Pilot ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Eminence Core]] is the [[Zenith Engine]].<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23">''The Pilot'', chapter 23</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Eminence Core]] appears as a bonfire with [[ruby]]-red flames.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|Core disappeared in a flurry of crimson sparks.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c23" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
